data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attempt counters and retry timestamps.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking attempt counters and retry timestamps, but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or records that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for these counters and timestamps, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating their existence or tracking in the system. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as the necessary data to assert a hard requirement failure is missing.
gaps: No evidence of attempt counters and retry timestamps.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for attempt counters and retry timestamps
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that attempt counters and retry timestamps are recorded for each notification delivery.
